_meta.purpose: Finalized fixed pixel rects for the TP0 admitted metrics + the M12 identity regions. Authored against the blessed HEAD anchors after the operator gate (plan 01-06). Canonical rect record; metrics.mjs REGIONS / m1-m2-m12.mjs M12_REGIONS mirror these values.
_meta.blessed_frames: docs/table-3d/anchors/head/{hero,card,macro}.png (committed downscaled; full-res working copies in gitignored .dev-stack/diag/)
_meta.note: POV rect promoted from PROVISIONAL to FINAL now that the operator locked POV fov 40 (Gate 2, 2026-06-10). HERO/MACRO rects unchanged (fovs 32/26 were always final).

framing_corners_note: Current baseline fills the BOTTOM corners with lit felt and the TOP corners with the dark room backdrop; the 8-20% vignette falloff the SSOT targets lives in the TOP corners. A true restrained four-corner vignette is a TP6 deliverable (M8/+A informational at TP0).

results_2026_06_10.note: Fresh capture vs frozen baseline; all identity regions MSE=0 (byte-deterministic render, M9-consistent). The POV-region M12 deferred by plan 04 is now CLOSED at the locked fov40.
